'''Icus Traft''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as a [[Colonel/Legends|colonel]] in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]]. He was assigned as the commander of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Fuel/Legends|fuel]]-[[Ore/Legends|ore]] processing plant on the backwater [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Gap Nine]].

Colonel Traft was very greedy, and was responsible for selling stolen artifacts from the ancient temples that were found on Gap Nine.

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|7|The Battle for Gap Nine}} {{1st}}
